Interface OpenCloseable

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
All Known Implementing Classes:
BlockingLogHandler, CountingLogHandler, ErrorDescLogHandler, FilteringLogHandler, LogHandler, ParseLogHandler, RedirectingLogHandler, RetainingLogHandler, TestingLogHandler, TimingLogHandler
public interface OpenCloseable extends AutoCloseable
A object that can both be opened and closed.
See Also:
  • LogHandler

    static final OpenCloseable
    EMPTY
    An OpenCloseable without effect.

  • Field Details

    • EMPTY

      static final OpenCloseable EMPTY
      An OpenCloseable without effect.

  • Method Details

    • combine

      static OpenCloseable combine(OpenCloseable... openCloseableArray)
      Returns:
      a OpenCloseable that, when opened, calls open() on each given OpenCloseable, in the given order. When closed, calls close() in each given OpenCloseable in reverse order.

    • open

      void open()

    • close

      void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
